info.title: Witbo Business API
info.description:
All endpoints except POST /api/login require a Bearer token. All data is scoped to the authenticated workspace.

### Mobile App Onboarding
Instead of manual login, the mobile app connects by scanning a QR Code generated in the **Settings -> Developer & API Infrastructure** dashboard.

**What the QR Code contains:**
The QR code encodes a raw JSON string with the API Base URL and the newly generated API token. The mobile app must parse this JSON to configure its HTTP client.

```json
{
  "url": "https://call.witbo.com.cy/api",
  "token": "1|abcdef1234567890qwertyuiop"
}
```

QRAuthPayload.description: JSON payload embedded in the connection QR code available in the web dashboard.

get.summary: Get current user and workspace context
Lookup contact by phone (last 8 digits match)

post.summary: Lookup or create contact by phone

get.summary: Get invoice with payments, VAT breakdown and attachments

post.summary: Bulk import phone contacts from mobile device
post.description: Upserts by last-8-digit phone match. Skips soft-deleted. Rate-limited 10/min.

post.summary: Bulk import call logs from mobile device
post.description: Deduplicates by phone+date+type. Accepts Unix timestamps (ms or s). incoming/outgoing aliases accepted.

post.summary: Trigger bank sync for all active connections (rate-limited 5/min)
post.description: Returns immediately. Sync runs asynchronously via queue.
